name: ruby-fiber-storage
title: ruby-fiber-storage
summary: Provides a compatibility shim for fiber storage
description:
Provides a compatibility shim for fiber storage
This gem provides a shim for Fiber.[], Fiber.[]=, Fiber#storage,
Fiber#storage=, which was introduced in Ruby 3.2.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use ruby-fiber-storage because Provides a compatibility shim for fiber storage.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use ruby-fiber-storage as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair ruby-fiber-storage with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `ruby-fiber-storage --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
